message:
fix(extensions): log every failing WASM extension, not just the first

Review-pass follow-up on the parallel-dispatch rewrite in 477cbe6d /
5f82141e. The previous error branch returned immediately on the first
`Err`, so if N > 1 extensions failed under `join_all`, only extension
0 got an attributed `ext.wasm.dispatch.failed` warn! line — the rest
were silently dropped even though join_all had their results in hand.

Walk every result: log each Err with its extension name attribution,
remember the first as the one we'll bubble (matching the old
sequential behavior of returning the first error), and skip
overwriting `response` once any error has been seen so we don't
return a partial success to the caller.
